settings.title: Book Appointments
settings.description:
Having the honour of capturing sentiment, love and connection within a piece of jewellery is one of the most rewarding parts of our business. Create something unique with our consultations - virtually or in one of our Showrooms.

All appointments are complementary.

To assist us with booking the best appointment for you, please choose from the below options.
settings.feature_text: We welcome you to find the perfect collection piece or create something unique, virtually or at our Avalon or Paddington Showrooms.

settings.title: Ceremonial Atelier
settings.description:
Our Ceremonial Atelier is our way of bringing the NMJ experience beyond Sydney — taking our world of bespoke design, craftsmanship, and personal connection on the road. Each Atelier offers the opportunity to meet with our team in person, explore our Ceremonial and Engagement collections, and begin the journey of creating a piece that is uniquely yours.

Whether for a proposal, your wedding day, a sentimental keepsake, or a milestone worth remembering, our team will guide you through a considered and collaborative design experience.
settings.description_mobile:

settings.title: The Art of Opposing Practices
settings.description:
We invite our community to an intimate evening exploring motherhood and creativity. Join us on 7 May at our Paddington showroom for a live panel and Q&A featuring our founder Natalie Fitch, Tara Cooper (Director, Elce Swim), and Bobby Clark (Melbourne-based artist).

Enjoy canapés, wine by Winona, and a first look at an exclusive mobile inspired by our Sollune Necklace, created with Bobby Clark, plus exclusive offers on the night.

A space to connect, listen, and share. Ticket redeemable on product.
settings.description_mobile:
We invite our community to an intimate evening exploring motherhood and creativity. Join us on 7 May at our Paddington showroom for a live panel and Q&A featuring our founder Natalie Fitch, Tara Cooper (Founder, Elce Swim), and Bobby Clark (Melbourne-based artist).

Enjoy canapés, wine by Winona, and a first look at an exclusive mobile inspired by our Sollune Necklace, created with Bobby Clark, plus exclusive offers on the night.

A space to connect, listen, and share. Ticket redeemable on product.

settings.title: Bespoke
settings.description:
Location shouldn’t restrict creative expression, and we work with clients situated all over the world to bring their dream bespoke concepts to life – from necklaces to bracelets, engagement rings to anniversary gifts, milestone birthdays and more.

Book for:

  • Custom designs
  • Design your own
settings.description_mobile:
Location shouldn’t restrict creative expression, and we work with clients situated all over the world to bring their dream bespoke concepts to life – from necklaces to bracelets, engagement rings to anniversary gifts, milestone birthdays and more.

Book for:

  • Custom designs
  • Design your own

settings.title: Engagement
settings.description:
A conduit for a question; a symbol of forever. Our engagement service is anchored in intimacy and personalisation, accessible in-person at our Avalon and Paddington Showrooms.

Book for:

  • Online Engagement Collection
  • One of a Kind Collection
settings.description_mobile:
A conduit for a question; a symbol of forever. Our engagement service is anchored in intimacy and personalisation, accessible in-person at our Avalon and Paddington Showrooms.

Book for:

  • Online Engagement Collection
  • One of a Kind Collection

settings.title: Wedding Bands
settings.description:
For emotionally significant pieces such as wedding bands, we pride ourselves on our warm and personalised service. To bring your ceremonial visions to life, let’s connect in-person at our Avalon studio.

Book for:

  • Online Ceremonial Collection
  • Classic bands, crown rings & signets
settings.description_mobile:
For emotionally significant pieces such as wedding bands, we pride ourselves on our warm and personalised service. To bring your ceremonial visions to life, let’s connect in-person at our Avalon studio.

Book for:

  • Online Ceremonial Collection
  • Signets, classic bands and crown rings

settings.title: Styling
settings.description:
Aesthetic taste is as inimitable as our fingerprints, and our passionate showroom team are always available for tailored consultations. Let us guide you through our collections, curated to your unique requirements and individual style.

Book for:

  • Curated stacks
  • Your personal jewellery collection
settings.description_mobile:
Aesthetic taste is as inimitable as our fingerprints, and our passionate showroom team are always available for tailored consultations. Let us guide you through our collections, curated to your unique requirements and individual style.

Book for:

  • Curated stacks
  • Your personal jewellery collection

settings.title: Gifting
settings.description:
For when words aren’t enough, consider a special gift or keepsake to express your affection or gratitude. Our showroom team are available to guide you through our various collections, and will tailor each consultation to your individual requirements, tastes and price-point.

Book for:

  • Ready to ships gifts
  • Milestone or occasion gifting

  • Milestone or occasion gifting

settings.title: Resizing
settings.description:
Most Natalie Marie Jewellery pieces are able to be resized within a certain range. To explore adjusting the size of your desired piece,drop in for a visit to our Avalon-based studio and allow our team to guide you through the process.

Visit us for:

  • NMJ jewellery alterations
  • Clean and service

settings.title: The Process
settings.description: Our distinctive aesthetic allows us to bring a singular and creative approach to designing. Craftsmanship and originality are at the forefront of our design ethos, with all pieces handcrafted with love to stand the test of time. We believe jewellery should be imbued with thought and sentiment – qualities that will endure through generations with the passing on of precious heirlooms.
